canonical_definition: Prompt with Explicit One Word Limitation (PromptEOL) is a prompting technique used to generate compact embeddings by instructing the model with 'This sentence: “[text]” means in one word: '.
papers: Your Mixture-of-Experts LLM Is Secretly an Embedding Model for Free
